prompt: Create a dynamic full-body anime poster illustration of an anthropomorphic dragon-wolf hybrid warrior on a clean white background, posed in a powerful crouching action stance with one knee raised, one hand reaching forward with sharp claws, and the other hand tucked into the hoodie pocket. The character has dark charcoal-black scales or fur, a long thick tail with red markings, spiky swept-back red hair and mane-like neck spikes, tall pointed red-and-black horns, angular black cheek fins, glowing red eyes, a snarling mouth with visible sharp teeth, and red claw tips. Dress the character in a deep red oversized hoodie with white drawstrings, a front pouch pocket, heavy folds, and a centered chest graphic of the character’s own fierce dragon head logo inside a circular emblem; add a small heart-like patch on the upper sleeve and a dark rectangular patch below it. Pair it with black tactical cargo pants featuring multiple straps, buckles, knee padding, thigh pouches, utility pockets, and loose gathered fabric, plus white athletic sneakers with red accents and gray laces. Surround the figure with bold red painterly slash effects, curved energy arcs, ink splatters, small black debris flecks, and two sharp red starburst spark shapes, emphasizing speed and aggression. Use crisp cel-shaded anime line art, high-contrast lighting, dramatic foreshortening, saturated red highlights, detailed clothing wrinkles, clean white negative space, and a polished character-poster composition with no readable text.
